# TEN — Hook tension / information gap

Genus: **Tensio**

Whether the opening creates unresolved but honest tension.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H015 | *Tensio uncus* var. h015-problem-hooks-beat | C. Hooks | Problem-first hooks beat neutral educational hooks. | EHR | M-SVT |
| H016 | *Tensio uncus* var. h016-contrarian-hooks-increase | C. Hooks | Contrarian hooks increase comments but can reduce trust if payoff is weak. | RET | M-SVT |
| H017 | *Tensio uncus* var. h017-proof-hooks-improve | C. Hooks | Proof-first hooks improve saves and follows. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H018 | *Tensio uncus* var. h018-curiosity-hooks-improve | C. Hooks | Curiosity hooks improve completion only when payoff is visible. | RET | M-SVT |
| H019 | *Tensio uncus* var. h019-identity-hooks-improve | C. Hooks | Identity hooks improve shares. | SND | M-SVT |
| H020 | *Tensio uncus* var. h020-cost-inaction-hooks | C. Hooks | Cost-of-inaction hooks outperform benefit hooks for mistake-fixing content. | EHR | M-SVT |
| H021 | *Tensio uncus* var. h021-question-hooks-underperform | C. Hooks | Question hooks underperform statement hooks unless highly specific. | CTV | M-SVT |
| H022 | *Tensio uncus* var. h022-hook-body-mismatch | C. Hooks | Hook-body mismatch boosts starts but hurts follow conversion. | FOL | M-SVT |
| H044 | *Tensio probatoria* var. h044-myth-evidence-correction | F. Story and payoff | Myth-evidence-correction drives comments and saves. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H055 | *Tensio actionalis* var. h055-surprise-improves-shares | G. Save, send, comment, follow | Awe/surprise improves shares more safely than anger. | SND | M-SVT |
| H094 | *Tensio uncus* var. h094-hooks-beat-vague | Information scent | Specific hooks beat vague curiosity hooks for educational or practical content. | EHR | M-SVT |
| H107 | *Tensio uncus* var. h107-hooks-missing-answer | Information gap | Hooks with a specific missing answer outperform vague suspense hooks. | RET | M-SVT |
| H108 | *Tensio uncus* var. h108-curiosity-hooks-increase | Information gap | Curiosity hooks increase completion only when payoff is concrete and visible. | RET | M-SVT |
| H109 | *Tensio uncus* var. h109-overpromising-hooks-increase | Information gap | Overpromising hooks increase starts but reduce follow conversion. | FOL | M-SVT |
| H110 | *Tensio tensionis* var. h110-mistake-frames-increase | Framing | Mistake frames increase early retention. | EHR | M-SVT |
| H111 | *Tensio actionalis* var. h111-checklist-frames-increase | Framing | Checklist frames increase saves. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H112 | *Tensio actionalis* var. h112-teardown-frames-increase | Framing | Teardown frames increase follows because they display judgment. | FOL | M-SVT |
| H113 | *Tensio actionalis* var. h113-myth-bust-frames | Framing | Myth-bust frames increase comments. | CMT | M-SVT |
| H123 | *Tensio probatoria* var. h123-someone-asked-framing | Social proof | Someone-asked-this framing increases watch intent because it implies validated demand. | EHR | M-SVT |
| H137 | *Tensio pulsus* var. h137-frustration-framing-improves | Emotional arousal | Frustration framing improves early retention, but solution framing preserves trust. | EHR | M-SVT |
| H138 | *Tensio pulsus* var. h138-surprise-framing-safer | Emotional arousal | Awe or surprise framing is safer than anger for long-term brand trust. | SND | M-SVT |
| H146 | *Tensio textualis* var. h146-contrarian-phrasing-works | Distinctiveness | Contrarian phrasing works best when paired with familiar visual context. | EHR | M-SVT |
| H157 | *Tensio uncus* var. h157-clickbait-hooks-improve | Clickbait risk | Clickbait hooks improve initial starts but lower completion and follow conversion. | RET | M-SVT |
| H158 | *Tensio uncus* var. h158-accurate-high-tension | Clickbait risk | Accurate high-tension hooks outperform exaggerated hooks over 7 to 30 days. | SEA | M-SVT |
| H159 | *Tensio uncus* var. h159-curiosity-plus-proof | Clickbait risk | Curiosity plus proof beats curiosity plus delay. | RET | M-SVT |
| H282 | *Tensio uncus* var. h282-ambiguous-opens-still | 1-second hold | Ambiguous opens can still work if the motion creates immediate curiosity without confusion. | MIX | M-SVT |
| H283 | *Tensio uncus* var. h283-problem-hooks-outperform | 3-second retention | Problem-first hooks outperform topic-first hooks for cold educational content. | MIX | M-SVT |
| H285 | *Tensio uncus* var. h285-hooks-longer-breath | 3-second retention | Hooks longer than one breath increase early drop-off unless paired with a strong visual payoff. | EHR | M-SVT |
| H289 | *Tensio uncus* var. h289-completion-improves-ending | Completion | Completion improves when the ending is foreshadowed but not fully resolved in the hook. | RET | M-SVT |
| H302 | *Tensio uncus* var. h302-comment-quality-improves | Comments | Comment quality improves when the prompt asks for a useful variable, such as niche, hook, or example. | CMT | M-SVT |
| H303 | *Tensio uncus* var. h303-controversial-hooks-increase | Comments | Controversial hooks increase comments but should be judged against completion and follow rate. | RET | M-SVT |
| H307 | *Tensio uncus* var. h307-profile-clicks-rise | Profile clicks | Profile clicks rise when the video creates authority curiosity rather than just giving a complete one-off answer. | CLK | M-SVT |
| H313 | *Tensio uncus* var. h313-clickbait-hooks-increase | Trust / negative feedback | Clickbait hooks increase starts but reduce completion and follow conversion when the payoff is weaker than the promise. | RET | M-SVT |
| H319 | *Tensio uncus* var. h319-hooks-should-name | Hook | Hooks should name a concrete gap, not vague suspense. | MIX | M-SVT |
| H320 | *Tensio uncus* var. h320-contrarian-hooks-require | Hook | Contrarian hooks require proof within 5–10 seconds to preserve trust. | TRU | M-SVT |
| H339 | *Tensio probatoria* var. h339-myth-evidence-correction | Story | Myth-evidence-correction increases comments but needs a replacement framework to earn saves. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H375 | *Tensio uncus* var. h375-fear-based-hooks | Finance / money | Fear-based hooks may raise starts but reduce trust unless paired with measured, sourced advice. | TRU | M-SVT |
| H405 | *Tensio emotiva* var. h405-relief-framing-works | Health / wellbeing - non-medical | Relief framing works better than fear framing for sustainable wellbeing content. | MIX | M-SVT |
| H406 | *Tensio uncus* var. h406-major-variable-test | Variant design | One major variable per test produces cleaner learning than changing hook, text, length and CTA simultaneously. | MIX | M-SVT |
| H423 | *Tensio uncus* var. h423-high-completion-action | Postmortems | Videos with high completion and low action need stronger save/send/follow design, not better hooks. | RET | M-SVT |
